projectDescription: A cross-platform Java desktop application that turns a Software Defined Radio into a multi-channel trunked radio scanner with live streaming, AI monitoring, and automated alerting.
keyFeatures: Multi-channel trunked radio decoding (P25 Phase 1 & 2, DMR, LTR, Analog FM)
Live audio streaming to Broadcastify, Zello, Icecast, Rdio Scanner, OpenMHz, and ThinLine Radio
Two Tone Detect for fire and EMS paging dispatch alerts
Inactivity monitoring with Telegram and Email notifications
Optional Gemini AI integration for automated channel tuning, log analysis, and audio quality monitoring
Tuner self-healing with automatic USB recovery and Windows PowerShell reset
Embedded in-app help viewer and knowledge base
Support for RTL-SDR, Airspy, HackRF, and SDRPlay RSP hardware
IAmResponding local UDP integration for volunteer fire and EMS
Consolidated user preferences with live diagnostics and per-category logging controls
publicApiSurface: Playlist Editor — configure radio systems, channels, and talkgroup aliases
Streaming Editor — set up Broadcastify, Zello, Icecast, Rdio Scanner, OpenMHz, ThinLine Radio, MQTT, and IAmResponding streams
Two Tone Editor — configure A/B tone detectors with Zello, MQTT, and IAmResponding actions
User Preferences — AI settings (Gemini API key, model), notification settings (Telegram, Email/SMTP), diagnostics toggles, recording paths, MQTT broker
Tuners panel — view and configure connected SDR devices, enable/disable, set gain and PPM correction
Now Playing view — real-time display of active talkgroups and decoded calls
Audio Recordings panel — browse, play, and manage locally recorded audio
Logs panel — view application logs with AI-powered plain-English translation
RadioReference API integration — import system and talkgroup configurations by county/state
